title: My Robot Is Weird!
description: Cheolsu, who has been single for 34 years straight and has never even managed to hold a proper conversation with a woman. So of course, he’s spending Christmas alone again. That is, until a strangely packaged box shows up at his house. And out of it comes… A TALL GUY IN A MAID OUFIT?! As if that isn’t shocking enough, the man casually introduces himself as a “companion robot,” and willy-nilly calling Cheolsu “Master.” He says he’ll take care of all the housework naturally and even provide… more intimate services. Hold on... Why is he so good at everything? Even that?!
author: Naknak
